articles.title: Patriots draft Illinois DE Gabe Jacas after trading up in Round 2
articles.description:
The Patriots packaged three picks on Friday night to trade up and draft Jacas.

The post Patriots draft Illinois DE Gabe Jacas after trading up in Round 2 appeared first on Boston.com.
